title: Diploma Notes
description: A separate student-friendly study platform for Kerala Diploma learners with syllabus access, lesson sections, model question paper links, and organized materials.

title: Smart Portfolio Dashboard
description: A responsive portfolio dashboard for presenting personal projects, resume highlights, and blog content with JSON-powered cards.

title: ESP32 Machine Monitor
description: An independent embedded monitoring concept for reading sensor values, tracking equipment status, and publishing lightweight dashboard data.

title: Electronics Lab Tracker
description: A personal lab tracking concept for organizing circuits, test readings, observations, and electronics maintenance tasks.

title: CNC Learning Checklist
description: A generic learning checklist for CNC setup awareness, quality verification, tool-condition review, and production handover basics.

title: Sensor Data Landing Page
description: A fast static landing-page concept for presenting sensor analytics, system status, and technical documentation.

title: Arduino Safety Indicator
description: An independent prototype concept using simple inputs, LED status outputs, and readable wiring documentation.

title: Broadcast Electronics Notes
description: Personal technical notes inspired by completed FM-radio training, covering signal-chain awareness and general maintenance principles.
